mapper.insert: INSERT INTO SMS.NOTICE ( TITLE, NOTICE_TYPE, USE_YN, START_DT, END_DT, VIEW_CNT, REG_DTTM ) VALUES ( #{title,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{noticeType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{useYn,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{startDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{endDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{viewCnt,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, SYSTIMESTAMP )
mapper.update: UPDATE SMS.NOTICE SET TITLE = #{title,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, NOTICE_TYPE = #{noticeType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, USE_YN = #{useYn,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, START_DT = #{startDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, END_DT = #{endDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, VIEW_CNT = #{viewCnt,jdbcType=NUMERIC} WHERE NOTICE_ID = #{noticeId,jdbcType=NUMERIC}
